footer.desc: Living guidelines for rare genetic diseases — an AI-drafted, source-cited summary of official guidelines and the literature, refreshed on demand. Not an official guideline; clinicians can rate and flag it.
footer.poweredByTail: — an open model that can run on-device, so a family's documents are de-identified before anything leaves the building.

doctor.title: Clinical decision support only
doctor.body: This document is evidence-based software output for discussion with your care team. It does not replace independent clinical judgment, institutional protocols, or direct examination of the patient.

parent.title: Informational — not medical advice
parent.body: What you read here is curated from published sources and may be incomplete or outdated. Always confirm diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up with your own clinicians.

pending.label: Source-backed
pending.text: AI-drafted from cited peer-reviewed sources — read with a clinician; not an official guideline.

locationMenu.label: Location
locationMenu.hint: Distance is measured to the doctor’s nearest practice. “No limit” shows everyone, sorted nearest first.

distancePill.title: Distance from your selected reference location (city in settings)

specialistDisclaimer.title: Automated directory
specialistDisclaimer.body: PubMed scores and roles are derived from publication metadata. This listing is not medical advice, an endorsement, or a guarantee that the clinician treats your condition.

trialsList.empty: No registered trials yet for this disease.

flowNode.terminalBranch: Nothing more on this branch — continue with the next step above when you are ready.

synthesisTeaser.subSynthesis: One summary across every source. Each sentence shows which document and passage it came from — plus AI suggestions from the latest literature.
synthesisTeaser.subAiDraft: There is no agreed guideline for this condition. AI assembled a draft from the literature — for expert review, not for guiding a patient.

compactSourceShelf.label: Sources ({{count}}) — click to open the original

diseaseTabs.noActiveTrials: No active trials matching this disease right now.
diseaseTabs.therapiesNote: These options manage symptoms and slow progression — none of them fully reverses established disease changes.
diseaseTabs.doctorsSourceMerged: Curated profiles merged with the latest Doctor Finder evidence where available.
diseaseTabs.doctorsSourceRanked: Ranked from the latest Doctor Finder run.
diseaseTabs.consensusDocumentFor: Consensus document for {{name}} — full text in the guideline reader.

officialGuidelineBlock.footBase: The AI-maintained living document below is read against this paper. Confirmed {{date}}

presets.onTop: Who’s on top of it now
presets.anyoneNear: Anyone near me who knows it

shelf.label: On the source shelf
shelf.hint: selected as a source the synthesis is built on

suggestion.label: Became an AI suggestion
suggestion.hint: produced a delta for clinician review

rejected.label: Considered, set aside
rejected.hint: read and consciously rejected — with a reason

low.label: Low triage signal
low.hint: passed relevance but too weak to act on this run

guideline.label: Guideline draft
guideline.sub: PubMed retrieval → therapy + diagnostic extraction → assembly with citations

doctors.label: Specialist doctors
doctors.sub: PubMed author scoring · institution + geo enrichment

official_guidelines.label: Official guideline
official_guidelines.sub: Recognised consensus paper (e.g. Boyce 2019 for FD)

summary.queued: Waiting for the worker to pick up this job.
summary.error: The job stopped before it could finish.
summary.guidelineDoneNoDraft: Pipeline finished without publishing a draft.
summary.guidelineRunningMining: Mining PubMed, scoring evidence, drafting sections.
summary.guidelineRunningStarting: Starting up — connecting to the workflow engine.
summary.officialDoneLinked: Linked to the recognised consensus paper.
summary.officialDoneNotFound: No consensus guideline found in PubMed.
summary.officialLookingUp: Looking up the recognised guideline document.
summary.settling: Saving results to the disease page…
summary.searchingPublicSources: Searching public sources — results land on the disease page as they come in.
